description: The settlements team has found a discrepancy between their records and a counterparty's invoice for a block of energy traded last month.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the original trade ticket details from the Energy Trade and Risk Management (ETRM) system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent fetches the trade ID, volume, price, time, and counterparty.

nodes.task_description: Pull the corresponding metered generation data from the asset for the specified time period.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the 5-minute interval generation data.

nodes.task_description: Compare the trade ticket, metered data, and the counterparty's invoice to pinpoint the discrepancy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the invoice incorrectly used a peak price for an off-peak hour.

nodes.task_description: Draft a dispute notification to the counterparty with all supporting evidence attached.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a formal dispute email with the correct data.
